description: This was a medium sized gull with a Ring-billed Gull nearby for size comparison. The dark bill was longish and noticeably drooped at the tip. It had the appearance of being long-bodied with long legs and long wings (although I only saw it perched and never in flight). The head at some dark feathers enough to show it as a dark-headed gull. The mantle was a few shades darker than the nearby RBGU. The dark wing tips did not show any white spots.Behavior: Foraging in a cove, very close to (about a foot from) shore.Call: none heardPlumage: 2nd summer
